name: 🧠 AI Learning Machine — Autonomous Research Engine

parameters.formDescription: Enter any topic. AI will research it across YouTube and the web, summarize everything, compile a master Google Doc, and notify you when your NotebookLM learning kit is ready.

values.placeholder: e.g. AI Agents and Multi-Agent Frameworks

values.fieldLabel: What I Specifically Want to Understand
values.placeholder: e.g. How do multi-agent systems work? What frameworks exist? How can I build one using n8n?

nodes.name: 📋 What Do You Want to Learn?

messages.content: You are a research strategist. Given a learning topic, generate the best search queries to find high-quality learning resources. Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown.

={{ 'You are a world-class research assistant and educator. Your job is to create the ULTIMATE learning document on a topic. ' + $json.levelInstruction + ' Return well-structured content with clear sections, explanations, examples, and key takeaways. Use markdown formatting with headers (##), bullet points, bold for key terms, and numbered lists for steps.' }}

={{ 'Create a comprehensive, in-depth learning document on: ' + $json.topic + '

Student level: ' + $json.level + '

Specific questions they want answered: ' + ($json.specificQuestions || 'Cover all major aspects') + '

YouTube videos found (reference these as recommended watching):
' + $json.youtubeVideos.map(v => '- ' + v.title + ' by ' + v.channel + ' (' + v.url + ')').join('
') + '

Create this document with these sections:

## 1. What Is [Topic]? (Clear definition and why it matters)
## 2. How Does It Actually Work? (Mechanics explained simply)
## 3. Key Concepts You Must Understand (5-10 core concepts with definitions)
## 4. Real-World Applications and Examples (At least 5 practical examples)
## 5. Step-by-Step: How to Get Started (Practical first steps for the student)
## 6. Common Tools and Platforms (What tools exist, which are free, which are best)
## 7. Common Mistakes and Misconceptions (What beginners get wrong)
## 8. Advanced Topics for Further Learning (What to explore next)
## 9. Key Questions to Test Your Understanding (10 self-assessment questions)
## 10. Recommended Resources
### Videos to Watch:
[List the YouTube videos found above with titles and URLs]
### Articles to Read:
[Suggest 5 articles/blogs to search for]

Make this document 2000-3000 words. Be thorough, practical, and engaging. Use analogies for complex concepts. Include specific numbers, statistics, and examples wherever possible.' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ requests: [{ insertText: { location: { index: 1 }, text: $('📝 Compile Master Document').first().json.masterContent } }] }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '🧠 Your Learning Kit Is Ready: ' + $('📝 Compile Master Document').first().json.topic }}
parameters.message:
={{ '🧠 YOUR AI LEARNING KIT IS READY!

Topic: ' + $('📝 Compile Master Document').first().json.topic + '
Level: ' + $('📝 Compile Master Document').first().json.level + '
YouTube Videos Found: ' + $('📝 Compile Master Document').first().json.youtubeCount + '

📄 YOUR MASTER GOOGLE DOC:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/' + $('📄 Create Google Doc').first().json.documentId + '/edit

🎙️ NEXT STEPS — NOTEBOOKLM:
1. Go to notebooklm.google.com
2. Create a new notebook
3. Click Google Docs → select your Learning Kit doc (it is already in your Drive)
4. Add the YouTube URLs from the doc as additional sources
5. Click Audio Overview → Deep Dive → Generate
6. Generate Study Guide, FAQ, and Quiz
7. Listen to the AI podcast while walking/commuting
8. Ask follow-up questions in the chat

Your entire learning kit was compiled by AI in under 2 minutes.
Total cost: Approximately INR 5.

— AI Learning Machine 🤖' }}
